status_legend.active: The feature is the current active task. AT MOST ONE feature may be 'active' at any time.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Prompt-anchored moments on Session Summary
features.user_visible_behavior: Each user prompt anchors a row with cost, turn count, file edits, top tools, and a response excerpt — so the page reads as a narrative of the session, not a stats dashboard.
verification: Open /conversations/0f018f00-4a24-4e1d-bf1a-aaa297d874a7/summary
Confirm the Prompts section appears below the Participants strip
Confirm the first row shows: prompt text + ↳ response excerpt + metadata line (turns · files · cost · tool chips)
Confirm 'Show all N prompts' button appears when N > 20
Run npx tsc --noEmit and confirm exit 0
evidence: Commit d4d7b75 (Phase 8 — prompt-anchored session summary, project detail rebuild)
features.notes: Phase 1 + 1.1 shipped together after a revert / rebuild cycle.

features.title: Bidirectional scroll + focus-event on conversations page
features.user_visible_behavior: Clicking the ↗ jump icon on a prompt row opens the conversation centered on that event, with the original lazy-load behavior preserved for older AND newer events.
verification: From /conversations/[id]/summary, click ↗ on any prompt row
Verify the conversations page opens with the target event in view + briefly highlighted
Scroll up to trigger before_id pagination — confirm older events load
Scroll down to trigger after_id pagination — confirm newer events load and stop when at latest
Confirm no regression when opening /conversations/[id] without ?focus param
features.notes: Queued as Phase 1.2. Adds after_id and focus_id params to /api/sessions/[id]/events. Bidirectional IntersectionObserver in the conversations client.

features.title: Render task-notification XML as readable rows
features.user_visible_behavior: Prompts whose content starts with <task-notification> render as 'Agent task completed: <summary>' with a bot icon, instead of raw XML.
verification: Find a session that includes an agent task notification (audit session 0f018f00 has many)
Confirm rows starting with <task-notification> show parsed summary, not raw tags
Confirm <ide_opened_file> and <system-reminder> get similar treatment
Confirm normal user prompts are unchanged

features.title: Adopt harness-engineering methodology + team upgrade + AGENTS.md split
features.user_visible_behavior: Repo follows the learn-harness-engineering methodology end-to-end: harness artifacts at root, AGENTS.md as the entry point, 8-agent team with clear boundaries, harness-engineering skill owned by CEO, feature planning files required before code, single source of truth for rules.
verification: AGENTS.md exists at root with project overview + run commands + 15 hard constraints
CLAUDE.md slimmed to architecture detail only (no duplicate rules section)
.claude/skills/harness-engineering/SKILL.md exists with full methodology distillation
.claude/agents/ contains exactly 8 files (operational + specialist + audit roles)
All agents have 'What you do NOT do' + 'When you find yourself out of scope' sections
docs/ reorganized into planning/product/testing/requirement/
feature_list.json, claude-progress.md, session-handoff.md, clean-state-checklist.md, evaluator-rubric.md, quality-document.md all present at root
docs/planning/features/_TEMPLATE.md has 8 sections (incl. §6 Files touched)
Zero broken file refs, zero absolute /Users/ paths, zero stale CLAUDE.md Rule references
evidence: TC-TU-01 through TC-TU-07 all PASS per the planning file's §5 Execution log
Final wide-sweep audit clean (this session's verification)
features.notes: Foundation work that enables every future feature to follow the methodology. Pre-condition for everything queued.

features.title: Rule library audit — verify all 15 rules fire correctly
features.user_visible_behavior: Each of the 15 insight rules in app/api/insights/route.ts produces correct output (or correctly stays silent) when dry-run against the live DB.
verification: For each rule, run the SQL against ~/.claude-dashboard/dashboard.db
Confirm the rule fires on the expected sessions
Confirm body text reads correctly with live numbers
Confirm edge cases enumerated in docs/product/insight-specs/ are handled
Record per-rule verdict in docs/testing/_AUDIT_2026-05-16.md
